reviews.comment:

Excellent service, in all services, however they are used, excellent, I do not regret being a member, everyone is very kind, polite and helpful.

reviews.comment:
Mala predisposición del personal de playa. Apurados y con malos gestos cuando demoras un momento en abandonar la playa de carga

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were unhelpful. They were rushed and rude when you took even a moment to leave the loading area.

reviews.comment:
Deja mucho que desear, ayer domingo, 9 y media de la mañana el shop cerrado, y la maquina para inflar las ruedas del vehiculo sin funcionar. Lo unico destacable son los playeros que tienen buena onda.

(Translated by Google)
It leaves a lot to be desired. Yesterday, Sunday, at 9:30 a.m., the shop was closed, and the tire pump wasn't working. The only thing worth mentioning are the friendly beach attendants.

reviewReply.comment: Martín como estas, los domingos se encuentra cerrado el shop durante todo el día, en cuanto al compresor de neumáticos tuvimos un problema puntual ese día, pero ya se encuentra en funcionamiento, te esperamos pronto! Slds.
